zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Verdun於1256年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特時，她的父親Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath31歲，母親Eleanor de Bohun11253歲。她於1282年之前與Baron John de Grey在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1323年10月23日在英國英格蘭賀福爾維爾頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Verdun于1256年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾德雷頓 巴塞特时，她的父亲Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath31岁，母亲Eleanor de Bohun11253岁。她于1282年之前与Baron John de Grey在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1323年10月23日在英国英格兰賀福爾維爾頓享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Verdun was born in 1256, in Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath, was 31 and her mother, Eleanor de Bohun, was 11253. She married Baron John de Grey before 1282, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 23 October 1323, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Verdun est née en 1256, à Drayton Bassett, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Bohun, avait 11253 ans. Elle a épousé Baron John de Grey avant 1282, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 octobre 1323, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat vor 1282 in England Baron John de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Verdunが1256年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアドレイトン バセットで生まれた時，父Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeathは31歳，母Eleanor de Bohunは11253歳であった。1282年以前にイギリスでBaron John de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1323年10月23日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Verdun(이)가 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드라이턴 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Bohun(은)는 11253세였다. 그녀는 1282년 이전 영국에서 Baron John de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 10월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Verdun родилась в 1256 г. в местности дреитон бассетт, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Bohun, 11253. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baron John de Grey перед 1282 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 23 октября 1323 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Baron John de Grey antes de 1282, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de octubre de 1323, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
